title: geum schofieldii
intro: Geum schofieldii, also known as Schofield's avens, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rosaceae. It is a perennial herb native to the southwestern United States and Mexico, known for its medicinal properties and various health benefits. The plant contains flavonoids and phenolic acids, which have been shown to have anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects, making it useful for treating wounds, skin conditions, and digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Geum schofieldii include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to soothe skin irritations, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing.
